Home Now Logs Uses Media

/uses

A dynamic, flat-file catalog of physical hardware, software integrations, and daily tools that power my workflow.

Hardware

  • MacBook Pro 14" (M3 Max, 64GB RAM) ↗

    My primary workstation. Quiet, battery-efficient, and easily handles local LLMs and heavy builds.

  • Apple Studio Display ↗

    5K resolution matches macOS scaling perfectly, minimizing eye strain during long coding sessions.

  • HHKB Professional HYBRID Type-S ↗

    Silent Topre switches in a compact, ergonomic layout that has cured my wrist fatigue.

Software

  • Visual Studio Code (with Tokyo Night) ↗

    A customized, distraction-free environment paired with Vim keybindings and system monospace fonts.

  • Arc Browser ↗

    Replaces standard browser tabs with sidebar spaces, making research categorization much cleaner.

  • Tailscale ↗

    Zero-config mesh VPN that seamlessly links my phone, laptop, and home server.

© 2026 — Built statically with Astro & Tailwind

GitHub / RSS
